suggestions.rationale: A deep pool of assessable electrical subcontractors — sublet for competitive tension and specialist labour.
Assessable MEP specialists are available — sublet the plant-heavy scope.
A licensed fire-services trade with an assessable pool — sublet to a registered specialist.
Strong in-house fitting-out capability and a broad pool — self-perform to protect margin and programme.
A specialist GI trade with a thin in-house pool but assessable drillers — sublet.
